name: harvester
description: Rancher Harvester HCI management via kubectl. Ask Claude to manage VMs, volumes, images, and networks in your Harvester cluster using standard kubectl commands with Harvester CRDs.

tools.name: kubectl
tools.description:
Run any kubectl command against your Harvester cluster. Pass all arguments after 'kubectl' as an array. Supports stdin for apply -f -.

Harvester-specific resources: VirtualMachine, VirtualMachineImage, VirtualMachineInstance

Examples:
- List VMs: ["get", "vms", "-n", "default"]
- VM details: ["describe", "vm", "my-vm", "-n", "default"]
- Start VM: ["annotate", "vm", "my-vm", "harvesterhci.io/startVM=true"]
- List volumes: ["get", "pvc", "-n", "default"]
- List images: ["get", "virtualmachineimages", "-n", "default"]
- Node status: ["get", "nodes", "-o", "wide"]

stdin.description: Optional YAML/JSON to pipe to the command (for kubectl apply -f -)
